data.title: Coinbase Partners with Irdeto to Fight Crypto-Fuelled Piracy
data.description:
Coinbase has partnered with the digital platform security team Irdeto to fight against piracy and cybercrime funded by cryptocurrency.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-partners-with-irdeto-to-fight-crypto-fuelled-piracy/

data.title: $400K Bitcoin? Analyst Says It’s Not A Dream—It’s ‘Coded’
data.description:
Bitcoin has been trading in a tight band lately. Over the last 24 hours it dipped a bit, but it still sits between $108,000 and $110,000. According to market data, that range has held firm even as volatility showed up back in January and April. Related Reading: Tether’s 2-Year, $5 Billion Investment Blitz Fuels US Companies: CEO Lagging Money Supply Signal According to analyst Kyle Chassé, Bitcoin’s price tends to follow global M2 money supply with a 90-day lag
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/400k-bitcoin-analyst-says-its-not-a-dream-its-coded/

data.description:

data.title: Trump takes tariff fight to Supreme Court as markets reel
data.description:
Markets are reeling as the Trump administration has decided to appeal to the Supreme Court by Friday in a bid to revive blocked tariffs
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trump-takes-tariff-fight-to-supreme-court-as-markets-reel

data.title: Bitcoin DeFi Explodes: Bull Run Locks 2,000 BTC – Is $115K Next?
data.description:
Bitcoin has reached a record $111,970 and steadied near $108k, while experts say this bull run has shifted momentum to Bitcoin DeFi. Growing BTC bridges like sBTC, L2s including Arch and Botanix, and BTC-backed stablecoins have opened lending, trading and yield without leaving Bitcoin.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-defi-bull-run-2000-btc-115k/

data.title: Matador Technologies to Acquire Stake in Indian Firm HODL Systems
data.description:
Matador Technologies, a Toronto-based digital asset firm, has entered a binding letter of intent to invest up to $3.2 million in HODL Systems, a publicly listed Indian company that integrates crypto into its treasury strategy. If fully exercised, the investment would give Matador up to a 24.95% ownership stake
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/05/29/matador-technologies-to-acquire-stake-in-indian-firm-hodl-systems

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $332 Million Liquidation in 24 Hours
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market saw liquidations totaling $332 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $218 million, while short positions made up $114 million.

data.title: New Report Reveals USDT Dominates Stablecoin Transactions, Mostly on Tron
data.description:
TL;DR Tether (USDT) accounts for 90% of global stablecoin payment volume, with the Tron network leading as the main settlement layer, hosting around 60% of all transactions. A report by Artemis, backed by Dragonfly and Castle Island Ventures, estimates the stablecoin payment market is moving over $72 billion annually. These figures confirm USDT’s dominant role,. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/new-report-reveals-usdt-dominates-stablecoin-transactions-mostly-on-tron/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation halts ETH dumps with $2 million stablecoin loan from Aave protocol
data.description:
Ethereum Foundation (EF) has borrowed $2 million worth of GHO stablecoin from DeFi lending platform Aave, using wrapped ETH as collateral. The move marks a departure from the Foundation’s usual ETH sell-offs for its operations. Aave Chan Initiative (ACI) founder Marc Zeller shared the transaction on X to promote using the Aave protocol. According to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-foundation-halts-eth-dumps/

data.title: US Treasury sanctions firm linked to $200 million in ‘pig butchering’ scams
data.description:
Treasury sanctioned a company accused of enabling multiple "pig butchering" scams, which defrauded U. S. victims of more than $200 million.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356240/us-treasury-sanctions-firm-linked-to-200-million-in-pig-butchering-scams?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: James Wynn closed 1,122 BTC at a stop loss, and the liquidation price dropped to $105,738
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, James Wynn stopped loss and closed 1,122 BTC, and the liquidation price dropped to $105,738. His current position: 40x leverage long 3,482 BTC, with a position value of $372 million. The opening price was $108,334 and the liquidation price was $105,738. Now he has lost $7.53 million in principal, and there is only $12.43 million left in the address (including the 126,000 HYPEs he is redeeming from the pledge).

data.title: James Wynn posted a post saying "F**K these c**ts" and had previously faced the risk of forced liquidation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn, a whale, posted a post on the X platform saying "F**K these c**ts". On-chain data showed that he had reduced his 40x leveraged BTC long positions on Hyperliquid. Previously, he was at risk of forced liquidation due to the decline in BTC prices.

data.title: Rain Launches Multi-Chain Stablecoin Visa Card Supporting Solana, Tron, and Stellar
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Stablecoin Visa card platform Rain announced that it has added support for Solana, Tron and Stellar networks, allowing projects based on these chains to quickly issue their own branded Visa cards and support stablecoins for global consumption and payment. KAST on Solana and Offramp on the Tron chain have taken the lead in adopting the platform, focusing on instant wallet consumption and the popularization of US dollar payments in Latin America, respectively. Rain has previously supported Arbitrum, Optimism and Polygon, and completed a $24.5 million Series A financing in March. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences Slight Decline Below $107,000
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin's value has recently fallen below the $107,000 mark. As of the latest report, the cryptocurrency is priced at $106,964.10 per coin, reflecting a 0.14% decrease within the day.

data.title: Rain Expands Visa Card Platform to Support Solana, Tron, and Stellar Networks
data.description: According to PANews, Rain, a stablecoin Visa card platform, has announced the addition of support for the Solana, Tron, and Stellar networks. This expansion enables projects based on these blockchains to swiftly issue their own branded Visa cards, facilitating global stablecoin transactions and payments. Solana's KAST and Tron's Offramp are among the first to adopt this platform, focusing on instant wallet spending and promoting dollar payments in Latin America, respectively. Previously, Rain supported Arbitrum, Optimism, and Polygon networks and completed a $24.5 million Series A funding round in March.

data.title: Russian police arrest suspect in $3.2 million crypto mining scam
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Russian police have arrested a person suspected of participating in a crypto mining scam involving 270 million rubles (about 3.2 million US dollars) and a total of 100 victims.
A local resident reported to the police in February that he handed over an ASIC mining machine to a person who claimed to run a "mining hotel" and the other party promised to provide passive income. The 26-year-old suspect and his two accomplices are accused of selling the mining machines they received and embezzling the funds used to purchase other mining equipment. (CoinDesk)

data.title: SOL Strategies increased its holdings by 26,478 SOLs, bringing its total holdings to over 420,000 SOLs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: "SOL version of micro-strategy" SOL Strategies announced on the X platform that it purchased 26,478 SOL tokens for $4.7 million on May 26, with an average purchase price of $177.5. As of now, its SOL holdings have reached 420,355, worth about 100 million Canadian dollars.

data.title: A whale holding about 920,000 Fartcoins bought 8.35 million OLIVA 20 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the giant whale address "GHw9C1" holding 927,700 Fartcoin (about 1.17 million US dollars) is buying OLIVIA. In the past 20 minutes, a total of 8.35 million coins were purchased, worth about 121,000 US dollars.
